message:
fix: resolve workspace-level dead code errors and fix 2 failing fsfs tests

- Gate auto_detect test helpers (create_test_model2vec_layout,
  create_test_vocab, create_test_safetensors) and their `use std::fs`
  import with `not(feature = "bundled-default-models")` to match their
  callers, preventing dead_code errors under workspace feature unification

- Fix output_schema::tests::context_for_model_errors: update assertion
  to match current bundled-models context text (was checking for "200MB"
  download size which no longer applies)

- Fix runtime::tests::runtime_search_payload_applies_extension_filter:
  update .rs test file content to include "authentication middleware"
  tokens so BM25 can match the search query through the type:rs filter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
